seoTitle: Connect Smartsheet to Power BI: Step-by-Step Setup
metaDescription: Learn how to connect Smartsheet to Power BI step by step, syncing project data for real-time insights and better decision-making.
intro: Combining Smartsheet's project management strengths with Power BI's analytics turns raw project data into real-time insights. This guide walks through setting up the connection, importing your data, and keeping it synced automatically.

steps.heading: Set up Smartsheet
steps.body: Make sure the relevant Smartsheet workspace is organized and ready to connect, since the structure of your sheets affects how cleanly the data imports.

steps.heading: Connect to Power BI
steps.body: Use Power BI's Smartsheet connector to establish the connection, entering the required credentials to authorize access.

steps.heading: Import data
steps.body: Bring your Smartsheet data into Power BI, selecting the specific sheets or data ranges you want to include in your report.

steps.heading: Automate data sync
steps.body: Set up a refresh schedule so updates made in Smartsheet automatically flow into your Power BI reports without manual re-importing.

steps.heading: Maximize efficiency in your analytics workflow
steps.body: With the two platforms connected, you can manage projects in Smartsheet while relying on Power BI for deeper analysis and reporting.

faq.question: Do I need a paid Smartsheet plan to connect to Power BI?
faq.answer: Connector availability can depend on your Smartsheet plan, so it's worth checking your account's specific integration permissions.

faq.question: Will updates in Smartsheet automatically appear in Power BI?
faq.answer: Yes, once you set up scheduled refresh, changes made in Smartsheet will flow into your Power BI report according to your chosen refresh frequency.

faq.question: Can I connect multiple Smartsheet workspaces to one Power BI report?
faq.answer: Yes, Power BI can pull in data from multiple Smartsheet sources and combine them within the same report.

faq.question: Is this integration useful for project management reporting?
faq.answer: Yes, it's especially useful for turning project tracking data from Smartsheet into visual dashboards for stakeholders in Power BI.
